title: How do you judge Makotos character
display_title: How do you judge Makotos character
wikitext:
[]: How do you judge Makoto's character?             Quote Post by Slowpokeking » Thu May 20, 2021 5:43 pm I think he was a nice person and efficient NERV member, one of the few ppl who would betray his organization for his loved one, even though she doesn't love him. And I fully understand his love for Misato, it's not a bad ending that he was able to see her kissing him before turning into LCL. I wonder if he was with her before, he would have done anything to protect Misato and Shinji.

[]: Re: How do you judge Makoto's character?             Quote Post by orcot » Sun May 30, 2021 12:45 pm He seems likeable for the amount of screentime he gets

And I fully understand his love for Misato, it's not a bad ending that he was able to see her kissing him before turning into LCL. I wonder if he was with her before, he would have done anything to protect Misato and Shinji.
